summary: Completed backend testing of LLM Provider endpoints for dual-mode LLM support (cloud vs local). All 6 new endpoints working correctly with proper fallback behavior.
passed_tests: GET /api/llm/status - Has all required fields (status, configuration, recommended_models, instructions)
GET /api/llm/status - Configuration structure correct (mode, local_available, cloud_available, models, fallback_enabled)
GET /api/llm/status - Recommended models properly structured with general/coding/reasoning categories
POST /api/llm/config - Local mode configuration works (with warnings since Ollama not installed)
POST /api/llm/config - Hybrid mode configuration works with fallback enabled
POST /api/llm/config - Custom local model configuration works
POST /api/llm/config - Invalid mode returns 422 validation error
GET /api/llm/models - Returns 200 with available=false (Ollama not installed)
GET /api/llm/models - Response structure correct (available, models, message)
POST /api/llm/test - Basic LLM generation works via cloud
POST /api/llm/test - Response has success, response, provider_used, model_used fields
POST /api/analyze - Returns llm_info with provider and model
POST /api/analyze - Analysis has proper Socratic structure with ambiguities
POST /api/resolve - Returns llm_info with provider and model
Hybrid mode fallback - Falls back to cloud when local unavailable
End-to-end LLM workflow - status -> config -> test -> analyze all work together
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper abstraction layer in llm_providers.py
HybridLLMProvider correctly handles fallback from local to cloud
All endpoints properly return llm_info metadata as specified
seed_data_creation: None - tests use dynamic session creation
context_for_next_testing_agent: LLM Provider endpoints fully tested. Local LLM (Ollama) is not installed in this environment, so local_available=false is expected. Hybrid mode correctly falls back to cloud. All endpoints return proper llm_info metadata.

features_verified.GET /api/llm/status: Returns LLM provider status, configuration, and recommended models - WORKING
features_verified.POST /api/llm/config: Allows switching between cloud/local/hybrid modes - WORKING
features_verified.POST /api/llm/test: Tests LLM generation with simple prompt - WORKING
features_verified.GET /api/llm/models: Lists available local models (reports unavailable since Ollama not installed) - WORKING
features_verified.POST /api/analyze: Socratic engine uses hybrid LLM and returns llm_info - WORKING
features_verified.POST /api/resolve: Uses hybrid LLM and returns llm_info - WORKING
